overall.description: First-person cockpit view of a mech or aircraft flying through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates between illuminated skyscrapers, neon signs, and massive advertising structures, culminating in passing a gigantic blue holographic figure. High-quality game engine rendering with dense urban environment and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The aircraft emerges into open airspace dominated by a massive blue holographic humanoid figure glowing with energy. The pilot flies toward and past this towering projection, which dwarfs the surrounding buildings, before continuing into the sprawling cityscape beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight that transitions from an open cityscape into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins with a smooth glide between towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by a kaleidoscope of colored lights, with the metallic cockpit frame and HUD displays framing the view. As the aircraft advances, the surrounding architecture begins to close in, narrowing the flight path. The scene then shifts into a tighter corridor of buildings before passing directly beneath a prominent green neon ZONE sign suspended between the structures.

The shot follows a continuous flight path that transitions from a claustrophobic, red-lit industrial corridor into a vast, open urban expanse dominated by a colossal holographic entity. It begins by navigating a striking canyon flanked by massive GEODAWN advertising structures and red and white striped towers. As the aircraft pushes forward through this visually intense corridor, the narrow walls suddenly give way to open airspace. The scene then expands to reveal a massive blue holographic humanoid figure glowing with energy, which the pilot flies toward and past as it dwarfs the surrounding architecture. Finally, the camera glides beyond the towering projection and continues its trajectory into the sprawling, illuminated cityscape.
